message:
shared,web: Add clientVersion field to transcripts

Extract client version from transcript data:
- Claude Code: from `version` field in message records
- Codex: from `cli_version` field in session_meta payload
- OpenCode: from `info.version` in transcript data

Store clientVersion in unified transcript schema and database.
Add e2e test assertions to verify clientVersion is persisted correctly.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/bovno5d77za56jn11o7cug5f

files.patch:
@@ -303,6 +303,7 @@ export const unifiedTranscriptSchema = z.object({
   preview: z.string().nullable(),
   summary: z.string().nullable().default(null),
   model: z.string().nullable(),
+  clientVersion: z.string().nullable(),
   blendedTokens: z.number(),
   costUsd: z.number(),
   messageCount: z.number(),

@@ -6,6 +6,9 @@ dist/
 # TanStack artifacts
 .tanstack/
 
+# Fumadocs generated
+.source/
+
 # Vite
 .vite/
 vite.config.ts.timestamp-*
